top_signals.title: Tencent tests AI assistant in China's most popular app as it looks to catch up with rivals
top_signals.summary: WeChat is an indispensable part of daily life in China and Tencent is trying to tap into its huge user base to expand use of its AI services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Greenspan Got Many Calls Right, Kroszner Says
top_signals.summary: Randall Kroszner, University of Chicago Booth School of Business professor, and former Federal Reserve Governor, who worked with Alan Greenspan, says he got many calls right during his career, but the "one negative" needs to be acknowledged. Some say Greenspan policies contributed to the 2008 financial crisis. Kroszner speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Keir Starmer steps down as UK prime minister
top_signals.summary: Departure comes as Wes Streeting backs Andy Burnham to be the next PM
